title: Garlicky Irish Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender potatoes and a hint of garlic, perfect for a cold winter's day.
instructions: 1. Peel and chop the potatoes into bite-sized pieces.
3. In a large pot, combine the chopped potatoes, minced garlic, and Irish Stew Seasoning.
4. Pour in the water and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
6. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
7. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
